## Source: amazon-inspector (376ab6840d12bf4d2b6ff51f365071cdefb5fae185ba150f7a8db8b70b925155)
The package characterai-poc was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (726f2991fa19eeaec29c57acfdbffca6a0bc4a5a5473d3e3b55719f3ddf576ee)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'characterai-poc' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
